description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:18.16.0 Docker image. Define a single stage named test and a job called test that runs in this stage. In the before_script it executes `git submodule sync --recursive`, `git submodule update --init --recursive`, `npm i`, and `cd demo && npm i && cd ..`. In the script it runs `cd demo`, then `npm run lint` and `npm run production`. The job stores the `public` directory as an artifact that expires after 1337 minutes.
